slice.description: Detect atlas geometry, generate review overlays, export audit JSON/TSV, and optionally emit preview slices.

compile.description: Compile selected atlas cells into selected square resolution packages with optional crispness, brightness, and contrast adjustments.

cell-targets.description: Convert selected review cells into bounded image-edit target configs.

censor-boxes.description: Apply coordinate-bounded mechanical edits to source atlases.

context-stamp.description: Apply crisp context-stamp infill to specified source boxes.

texture-infill.description: Fill specified boxes using nearby source texture patches.

procedural-infill.description: Fill specified boxes using local procedural texture statistics.

template-scrub.description: Scan configured roots for template matches and scrub bounded matches.

index-content.description: Build a 256px semantic/content tag index for compiled tiles, applying atlas/row/cell descriptors from configs/deep_asset_descriptors.json, and register it in asset_compile_manifest.json.
